item.title: Be Direct in Referral Requests 🎯 • Identify the mutual connection first. • Specify the role or company you seek. • Mention why you're a good fit. • Use: "I'm interested in [Role] at [Company]." • Offer to provide your resume for context. How can you make your referral request clear and compelling? #networking #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Be Direct in Referral Requests 🎯 • Identify the mutual connection first. • Specify the role or company you seek. • Mention why you're a good fit. • Use: "I'm interested in [Role] at [Company]." • Offer to provide your resume for context. How can you make your referral request clear and compelling? #networking #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
